programs.title: Elementary
programs.desc: When Holmes and Watson join forces on a double homicide, Sherlock's new apprentice, Kitty, threatens the investigation when she allows her jealousy of Sherlock and Joan's work rapport to override her better judgment.

programs.title: My Family
programs.desc: Michael is about to go on his first date, but Ben's plans to give him 'the big talk' are doomed when Nick offers his own advice first. Meanwhile, Susan fails to understand the importance of Prada jeans in Janey's life.

programs.title: Rage Special
programs.desc: From Eric Prydz to Dirty Projectors, Dua Lipa, Olivia Newton-John, Luke Million and more, rage lines up the sweatiest sportiest music videos in the collection.

programs.title: Breeders
programs.desc: Jim and Jackie are both struggling under their new circumstances. Luke has a choice to make, and Ally meets someone new.

programs.title: Breeders
programs.desc: A furious argument between Paul and Ally is interrupted by Ava’s news about Jim. Luke is happier than ever, a newly confident Ava stands up to her dad, but Paul and Ally need to decide—is this it?
